calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-03-2014 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-12-2013 Set For Trial On Nov-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Further Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions In The Amount Of $6120.00
Off Calendar Oct-01-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance(s) on TUE-OCT-01-2013:
Pritee Thakarsey, Esq. of Seyfarth Whaw LLP [415.397.2823] appearing for Defendant TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses is GRANTED. Plaintiff's cell phone records are relevant to the subject matter involved in the pending action, and are in his possession, custody, or control, despite the fact that the cell phone account may be owned by his mother in law. Plaintiff has the right to obtain from the cell phone carrier the records that pertain to his cell phone number. Plaintiff may redact his mother-in-law's mailing address and contact information if he so chooses. Defendant's Special Interrogatories Nos. 9, 10, and 11, seek information that is relevant to Plaintiff's mitigation efforts. Within 30 days Plaintiff shall provide documents responsive to Defendant's Request for Production No. 22, and shall provide Defendant with verified, code-compliant responses to Defendant's Special Interrogatories Nos. 9, 10 and 11. Defendant's request for sanctions is DENIED. Order signed in open Court. Judge Pro Tem: Ernst A. Halperin; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2013 Set For Trial On Sep-08-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
